options.defaultContent: Host metrics not yet available (node-exporter warming up).

panels.description: Host CPU busy %. Click title for the platform drill-down.
panels.title: CPU

panels.description: Host RAM in use %. Click title for the platform drill-down.
panels.title: RAM

panels.description: Root filesystem used %. Click title for the platform drill-down.
panels.title: Disk

panels.description: Known relays in the mesh (PLACEHOLDER — self only until upstream peers are exported from /state).
panels.title: Peers

panels.description: Distinct namespaces with tracks visible in the relay /state. Peak is over the dashboard time range.
panels.title: Namespaces

panels.description: Distinct (namespace, track) pairs visible in the relay /state. Peak is over the dashboard time range.
panels.title: Tracks

panels.description: Active publishers connected to this relay. Peak is over the dashboard time range.
panels.title: Publishers

panels.description: Aggregate active subscriptions (authoritative under load). Peak is over the dashboard time range.
panels.title: Subscribers

panels.description: p95 QUIC RTT across all connections. Rising latency + rising loss = overload. Peak over the dashboard range.
panels.title: Latency

panels.description: QUIC packet-loss ratio and socket-buffer datagram drops (read+write). Buffer drops are the overload signal — rising together with latency means the relay is saturating. (Garbage/undecodable packet drops from internet background noise are excluded; see the QUIC transport row.)
panels.title: Loss / drops

panels.description: Relay application throughput: QUIC payload bytes read/written (incl. MoQT framing + control — a close PROXY for object BW until the relay exports a true object-bytes-delivered counter). OS/NIC-level BW lives in the platform drill-down.
panels.title: BW in / out

panels.description: PLACEHOLDER — upstream/mesh relays this node peers with. Currently lists only this relay; populates once peer relays are exported from /state (downstream_peers) or mesh config. No scoping on click yet.
panels.title: Peer Relays

panels.description: One row per namespace. Click a namespace to scope the tracks table and the subscription graph below.
panels.title: Namespaces

panels.description: One row per track, scoped by the namespace selection. Click a track to scope the subscription graph.
panels.title: Tracks

panels.description: Subscribers per track over time, scoped by the namespace/track selection (top 10 when unscoped). Click a legend entry to isolate.
panels.title: Subscriptions per Track
